title: Spicy Juicy Comforting Korean Leek Stir-fry
description: A comforting and flavorful leek stir-fry with a spicy kick that's both healthy and delicious.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup water
ingredients.notes: to deglaze the pan after stir-frying

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add sesame oil and allow it to shimmer.
Add onion, leeks, and garlic to the skillet. Stir frequently until softened and slightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Pour in gochujang and lime juice. Simmer for an additional minute or so to bring out flavors.
Stir in soy sauce and continue simmering for another minute. Add water to deglaze the pan, scraping up any crispy bits from the bottom.
Reduce heat to low-medium and stir occasionally until slightly thickened, about 3-4 minutes more.
Serve hot over cooked rice or noodles.
